variants.name: switch-basic
variants.description: Icon (optional) + label only + switch indicator on the right. Compact single-line layout.

variants.name: switch-description
variants.description: Icon (optional) + label + secondary description text + switch indicator on the right. No border container.

variants.name: switch-boxed
variants.description: Icon (optional) + label + description + switch indicator on the right, enclosed in a bordered card container. Border changes to --text/placeholder color when disabled.

states.name: default-off
states.description: Interactive, unchecked. Track color: --selector/bg-enable. Dot at left. Label: --text/primary.

states.name: default-on
states.description: Interactive, checked. Track color: --selector/bg-active. Dot at right. Label: --text/primary.

states.name: disabled-off
states.description: Non-interactive, unchecked. Track color: --selector/bg-disabled. Dot at left. Label and description: --text/placeholder.

states.name: disabled-on
states.description: Non-interactive, checked. Track color: --selector/bg-disabled. Dot at right. Label and description: --text/placeholder.

sizes.name: default
sizes.note: Single size only. No size variants confirmed.

icon.description: 24×24px product icon on the far left of the row. Optional. Include or omit consistently within a group.

description.description: Secondary clarifying text below the label. Regular, 14px, --text/placeholder.

switch-indicator.description: 44×24px pill toggle with a sliding white dot. Always right-aligned. Based on the _base-switch sub-component. Track color and dot position reflect the checked and disabled states.

card-container.description: Bordered card wrapper with rounded corners and 12px padding. Border uses --layout/border (default) or --text/placeholder (disabled).

baseComponents.name: _base-switch
baseComponents.description: The pill-shaped toggle indicator. Exposes checked (boolean) and disabled (boolean) props. Track color is --selector/bg-active (on), --selector/bg-enable (off), or --selector/bg-disabled (disabled). Dot slides between left (off) and right (on) position.

baseComponents.name: _base-label-checkbox
baseComponents.description: The text container. Supports basic (label only) and label+desc modes. Shared with the Radio Select and Checkbox components.

instances.label: Security Ride Code
instances.description: Verify you are the right rider with a code
